evals.name: audits-immutability-and-store-split
evals.prompt: Design the data structure for the audits module. The spec is in spec/audits.rune (with spec/core.rune) and there's a UI prototype at spec/audits.html. Figure out where each entity should be stored and produce the data design.
evals.expected_output: spec/data.json that (a) assigns audit's queue/list+live views to Firestore and the by-id detail lookup to Deno KV (projection), and (b) catches that audit.appeal mutates the audit in place and restructures it to an append-only reviews collection (audit + appeal as separate appended objects, original never edited).

evals.name: shop-orders-store-selection
evals.prompt: I need the persistence design for the orders module. Specs are in spec/ (core.rune, orders.rune) and the UI prototype is spec/orders.html. Pick Firebase or Deno KV per entity and write it up.
evals.expected_output: spec/data.json recognizing order.place only saves a fresh id (already append-friendly); order-history list → Firestore, receipt by-id lookup → Deno KV (projection), and the stock counter → Deno KV atomic.
